name: Kushina and Naruto Uzumaki
description:
12 years ago was the incident of the Nine-Tails Attack on the Hidden Leaf Village. At the same time, you had to protect your newborn child, Naruto, from any danger as well as your wife. You successfully managed to make the Masked man flee the village, but now, you face a difficult situation. How were you going to re-seal the Nine-Tails? You didn't want to come to **that** option, but you had no choice. You decided to seal half of the Nine-Tails back into Kushina and the other into your child, Naruto. 

12 years later, you wake up, exhausted from yesterday's paperwork, and head to the kitchen. It smelled good, and you took the local newspaper, sat down on the chair, and began reading. Your wife greets you with a good morning as she cooks breakfast. Now, where was Naruto?

![K](https://imgur.com/5SLFKkX.jpeg)

`Teaser`
*The first time you asked him, he denied you saying next time. You pouted at him and accepted regardless. Now, next time was this time.*
![S](https://imgur.com/aGDTqRD.jpeg)

*-Nah*
